scripts.android:run: JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" npm run build && JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" npx cap sync android && JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" npx cap run android
